name: semctx-control
description: Give Codex deterministic repository impact analysis, authored intent, and fail-closed migration planning.

interface.shortDescription: Trace, plan, and verify repository migrations
interface.longDescription: Semctx Control Plane gives Codex a deterministic view of repository impact, authored goals and invariants, proof-carrying change contracts, and a read-only L0-L6 migration planner. It fails closed when targets, evidence, or authority are missing and never executes a cutover or deletion.
defaultPrompt: Trace this change from code to goals and invariants
Compile a fail-closed migration plan for this change
Verify this diff and list every missing proof
